allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8765 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id \([int]$_\) -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; Start-Process python -ArgumentList 'tracker.py' -WorkingDirectory 'C:\\Users\\gdavitiani\\Documents\\GitHub\\fitness'")

Bash(python -c "
import tracker, sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
with open\('README.md', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    for raw in f:
        line = raw.strip\(\)
        m = tracker.LINE_RE.match\(line\)
        if not m: continue
        year = int\(m.group\(1\)\)
        if year != 2024: continue
        label = m.group\(2\).strip\(\).lower\(\)
        content = m.group\(3\).strip\(\).lower\(\)
        if not label or label == 'rest' or content == '**rest**': continue
        if label == 'cardio': continue
        if tracker.CARDIO_RE.search\(content\): continue
        print\(line\)
")
